text:
Are any of these red lines for you?

- Convicted of 34 felonies
- Found liable for sexual abuse
- Called for executing his own general
- Said to "terminate" the Constitution
- Pardoned people who beat cops on Jan 6
- Defied the Supreme Court
- Arrested journalists
- Started a war without Congress
- Launched a pump-and-dump crypto scheme on his supporters

At what point does it become enough? Every claim above is documented with sources.
